# widgetDidBeginEditing()

**Instance Method**

Called when a user chooses the widget’s begin editing button.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func widgetDidBeginEditing()
```

## Discussion

This method can be called when [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetProviding/widgetAllowsEditing] is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Supporting Editing

- **widgetAllowsEditing**: A Boolean value indicating whether the widget can be edited by users.
- **widgetDidEndEditing()**: Called when a widget’s editing session ends.
